headline: 5 Overvalued Stocks to Take Profits On Now
summary:
Valuation issues are often ignored when stocks go parabolic on a daily basis.



But now that markets have gotten choppy and the chip momentum trade has broken down, value is once again on investors’ radar as winners

headline: Barclays Raises its Price Target on Iron Mountain (IRM)
summary: Iron Mountain Incorporated (NYSE:IRM) is one of the 10 Best Pick and Shovel AI Stocks to Invest In. On July 1, 2026, Barclays analyst Brendan Lynch raised the firm’s price target on Iron Mountain Incorporated (NYSE:IRM) to $143 from $127 and kept an Overweight rating. Lynch said Barclays raised targets across the communications infrastructure real estate […]
